description: Letter from Moshe b. Yefet in Malij to Efrayim b. Shemarya (fl. 1007–1055) in Fustat in which he informs his superior about a case in which a deceased man had appointed his wife guardian of his minor son and executor of his estate. The possessions were in the form of deposits with a banker and commercial goods with some important merchants. The writer wants Efrayim's assistance transferring the goods to the widow in Malij. (Information from Mediterranean Society, III, p. 331; I, p. 29 and Bareket)
description_he: מכתב ממשה ב' יפת ממליג' לאפרים ב' שמריה (פעיל 1007–1055) בפוסטאט, מודיע על מקרה שבו מת אדם ומינה את אשתו לאפוטרופא על בנו הקטן. הנכסים מופקדים אצל בנקאי וסוחרים. מבקש סיוע להעברת הרכוש לאלמנה.
